title: Shimriy #8113
definition:
Shimri = "vigilant"

 1) a Simeonite, son of Shemaiah and father of Jedaiah
 2) father of Jediael, one of David's mighty warriors
 3) a Merarite Levite, son of Hosah
 4) a Kohathite Levite of the sons of Elizaphan
nasbUsage:
